name: @figma-code-bridge/agent
description: Meld local agent — connects web IDE to your project via WebSocket

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts src/scanner.ts src/watcher.ts src/server.ts src/agent-loop.ts src/code-patterns.ts src/dev-server-manager.ts src/heartbeat.ts src/event-hooks.ts src/browser-agent.ts src/vm-screen.ts src/preview-checker.ts --format esm --dts --clean
scripts.dev: tsup src/index.ts src/scanner.ts src/watcher.ts src/server.ts src/agent-loop.ts src/code-patterns.ts src/dev-server-manager.ts src/heartbeat.ts src/event-hooks.ts src/browser-agent.ts src/vm-screen.ts src/preview-checker.ts --format esm --watch
